name: Nexon GT Co., Ltd.
summary: Nexon GT Co., Ltd. develops and sells game programs in South Korea. It is also involved in the real estate activities. The company was formerly known as GameHi Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nexon GT Co., Ltd. in 2014. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Seongnam, South Korea. Nexon GT Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of NEXON Korea Corporation.
